text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Now for the explanation of today's course. The starting point is
Bubblyland. All four segments are connected by a relay, ending at
Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The first segment is swimming. Athletes must make a round trip
through a wave pool. Adaptability will be key!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Second is the mission run. Athletes will have to complete a mission
before they can start running in this segment.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The mission has just been announced! Runners will have to add their
own flavoring to a plain sports drink!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The third segment is cycling. The route has many ups and downs,
eventually splitting into three paths that traverse a mountain.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The shortest but steepest route goes over the mountain. The riverside
route is the longest and goes around the mountain. The middle route
has rolling hills.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
All three routes converge on the mountain's downward slope. Route
selection will be crucial in this segment.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the finale—the anchor leg—is running! This segment is a circuit
on Tracen Academy's turf track!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The winning team will be presented with a plaque from our sponsor
and a luxurious prize. There will also be a special prize for the most
exciting team!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Prepare for the fierce battle that these Tracen Academy students are
about to fight! The start of the Team Triathlon is moments away!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Why if it isn't Team Centurial and Team Muscle.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Centurial is a pretty cool name. It sounds kinda dystopian, like a
gathering of demons or something.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to name it "The Centurial Overlord and Her Delightful
Companions," but that was too long to register.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Some of my teammates were of the opinion that "Overlord" was too
weighty. And lo, after some parley, we concluded that "Centurial" was
passable.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Um, guys... I think it's about to begin.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Spe, don't act like this doesn't concern you! What even is your
team's name?! At least try to be creative! Listen, naming is—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bang!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And there's the starting gun! The athletes spring into action—but
Gold Ship has yet to depart!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship appears to be in no hurry to start! Can she recover from this
setback?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Wahoo! I knew a kickboard would be perfect for surfing the waves!
Behold! My flawless balance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In this long lost utopia... allow the Overlord to breathe new life into a
paradise that faded along with the bubbles.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, feast your eyes! The Overlord and her bubbly fairies grace this
tide with their luster!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What's this? In a strange turn of events, T.M. Opera O and Gold Ship
are posing on their kickboards!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Wow, I'd love to try surfing myself someday!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The manufacturer sponsoring this competition has allowed the use of
certain equipment—kickboards included—however...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The two athletes on kickboards have not made any forward
movement! They are simply seesawing on the waves!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: My, how very uncouth. The beauty of my pose lies in its stillness.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So it's come down to a duel between you and me! That special prize is
mine!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sh-should I do something too?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Waaah! Just keep swimming normally, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
After a chaotic start, we're already nearing the end of the first part.
The leaders of the pack are preparing to pass their batons!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O and Gold Ship, who were far behind, are now closing
the gap with impressive flutter kicks! Neither is letting go of their
kickboard!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The first athlete to leave the water is Special Week! She heads
toward her team's second racer, Matikanetannhauser!
